name: SANGAMO THERAPEUTICS, INC
business: Sangamo Therapeutics is a genomic medicine company developing zinc finger epigenetic regulators and engineered AAV capsids to treat serious neurological diseases. Its wholly owned preclinical programs include ST-503 for small fiber neuropathy (chronic neuropathic pain) and ST-506 for prion disease. It also has clinical-stage programs: isaralgagene civaparvovec (ST-920) for Fabry disease and giroctocogene fitelparvovec (SB-525) for hemophilia A, with collaborators including Genentech, Astellas, Eli Lilly, Alexion, and Takeda.

exposures.sentence: We are a genomic medicine company committed to translating ground-breaking science into medicines that transform the lives of patients and families afflicted with serious neurological diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiation of rolling BLA submission for isaralgagene civaparvovec (Fabry disease) under Accelerated Approval pathway
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we initiated a rolling submission of a Biologics License Application, or BLA, to the FDA seeking approval of isaralgagene civaparvovec under an Accelerated Approval pathway.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of rolling BLA submission for isaralgagene civaparvovec
catalysts.sentence: We continue to develop the Chemistry, Manufacturing and Controls, or CMC, module, ahead of completion of the rolling BLA submission for isaralgagene civaparvovec, currently expected to occur as early as the summer of 2026 subject to our ability to secure adequate additional funding.

catalysts.event: FDA grant of Fast Track Designation to ST-503
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the FDA granted Fast Track Designation to ST-503.

catalysts.event: Activation of first six clinical sites and start of patient recruitment for ST-503 Phase 1/2 STAND study
catalysts.sentence: Following clearance in November 2024 of the investigational new drug application, or IND, from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, or FDA, for ST-503 for the treatment of SFN, the first six Phase 1/2 clinical sites have been activated, and we have begun patient recruitment and enrollment.

tamClaims.claim: Small fiber neuropathy has an estimated prevalence of at least 180,000 patients in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: SFN has an estimated prevalence of at least 180,000 patients in the U.S., and more broadly, peripheral neuropathies are estimated to affect nearly 40 million Americans.

tamClaims.claim: More broadly, peripheral neuropathies are estimated to affect nearly 40 million Americans.
tamClaims.sentence: SFN has an estimated prevalence of at least 180,000 patients in the U.S., and more broadly, peripheral neuropathies are estimated to affect nearly 40 million Americans.

tamClaims.claim: At least 1,500 new cases of prion disease are identified each year in the United States, Europe and Japan.
tamClaims.sentence: At least 1,500 new cases of prion disease are identified each year in the United States, Europe and Japan, with a similar presence globally.
